mapper.sql: select e.expense_id, e.dept_id, e.period_id, e.expense_no, e.expense_date, e.expense_type, e.expense_content, e.payment_method, e.expense_amount, e.advance_id, e.status, e.verify_by, e.verify_time, e.del_flag, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.remark, a.advance_no from fin_expense e left join fin_advance a on e.advance_id = a.advance_id
mapper.select: select count(*) from fin_expense where date(create_time) = curdate()
select ifnull(sum(expense_amount), 0) from fin_expense where status = '0' and del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(expense_amount), 0) from fin_expense where status = '0' and del_flag = '0' and dept_id = #{deptId}
select ifnull(sum(expense_amount), 0) from fin_expense where del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(expense_amount), 0) from fin_expense where del_flag = '0' and dept_id = #{deptId}
select ifnull(sum(expense_amount), 0) from fin_expense where del_flag = '0' and period_id = #{periodId}
mapper.insert:
insert into fin_expense
dept_id, period_id, expense_no, expense_date, expense_type, expense_content, payment_method, expense_amount, advance_id, status, verify_by, verify_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{deptId}, #{periodId}, #{expenseNo}, #{expenseDate}, #{expenseType}, #{expenseContent}, #{paymentMethod}, #{expenseAmount}, #{advanceId}, #{status}, #{verifyBy}, #{verifyTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark},
mapper.delete: update fin_expense set del_flag = '2' where expense_id = #{expenseId}

update fin_expense set del_flag = '2' where expense_id in
#{expenseId}
